title: exellodendron gardneri
intro: Exellodendron gardneri, also known as the Gardner's Exellodendron, is a plant species in the family Loganiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and fever. The plant is valued for its expectorant properties, helping to loosen and clear mucus from the lungs, and its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce swelling and ease pain. In herbal preparations, Exellodendron gardneri is often made into a decoction, a liquid extract, which can be consumed to harness its health benefits, such as relieving coughs and sore throats.
